mapper.select:
SELECT p.work_instruct_detail_code, c.prod_code, c.prod_name, p.prod_quantity - SUM(NVL(s.store_quantity,0)) prodQuantity
FROM work_instruct_detail i JOIN work_progress p ON(i.work_instruct_detail_code = p.work_instruct_detail_code) JOIN prod_common c ON(c.prod_code= i.prod_code) LEFT JOIN prod_store s ON(i.work_instruct_detail_code=s.work_instruct_detail_code) WHERE p.proc_num=(SELECT max(m.proc_num) FROM work_progress m WHERE p.work_instruct_detail_code=m.work_instruct_detail_code)
AND c.prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
GROUP BY p.work_instruct_detail_code, c.prod_code, c.prod_name,p.prod_quantity HAVING p.prod_quantity - SUM(NVL(s.store_quantity,0)) > 0
SELECT 'LOT-'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) lot FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(lot, 5)) order_num FROM prod_store)

SELECT i.LOT, i.work_instruct_detail_code, i.prod_code, c.prod_name, i.store_quantity before_quantity, i.store_date, i.emp_code, e.emp_name FROM prod_store i JOIN prod_common c ON (i.prod_code = c.prod_code) JOIN emp e ON(e.emp_code = i.emp_code)
AND c.prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND i.LOT LIKE '%'||#{lot}||'%'
ORDER BY i.LOT DESC

SELECT NVL(p.prod_quantity,0) - SUM(NVL(s.store_quantity,0)) prodQuantity
FROM work_instruct_detail i LEFT JOIN work_progress p ON (i.work_instruct_detail_code = p.work_instruct_detail_code) LEFT JOIN prod_common c ON (c.prod_code= i.prod_code) LEFT JOIN prod_store s ON (i.work_instruct_detail_code=s.work_instruct_detail_code)
WHERE p.proc_num = (SELECT max(m.proc_num) FROM work_progress m WHERE p.work_instruct_detail_code=m.work_instruct_detail_code) AND p.work_instruct_detail_code = #{workInstructDetailCode} AND c.prod_code=#{prodCode}
GROUP BY p.prod_quantity
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prod_store(LOT, work_instruct_detail_code, prod_code, store_quantity, store_date, emp_code) VALUES (#{lot}, #{workInstructDetailCode}, #{prodCode}, #{storeQuantity}, #{storeDate}, #{empCode} )
mapper.select:
SELECT LOT, FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code) prod_name, store_quantity, store_date, FIND_EMP_NAME(emp_code) emp_name FROM prod_store
AND LOT LIKE '%'||#{lot}||'%'
AND FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code) LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND FIND_EMP_NAME(emp_code) LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(lot,4))
